title: Shri Ram Mantra
intro: Read the Ram Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Ram.
description:
Om Ramaya Namaha॥
(Or: Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram॥)
O Lord Shri Rama, I bow to You. This mantra is a call to Lord Rama, the symbol of righteousness, truth, and dignity.

faq.q1: When should Shri Ram Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Shri Ram Mantra can be chanted with devotion in the morning, evening, or at any auspicious time.
faq.q2: How many times should Shri Ram Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Shri Ram Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Shri Ram Mantra is believed to bring peace, courage, positive energy, and the blessings of Lord Rama.
faq.q4: Can anyone chant Shri Ram Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, anyone can chant Shri Ram Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Shri Ram Mantra be chanted without a rosary (mala)?
faq.a5: Yes, the mantra can be chanted without a mala as long as it is recited with devotion and concentration.
